subcodes.first_line: O ye real friends and heartfelt beloved of ‘Abdu'l-Bahá! Your petition full of prayer and supplication was received... Not one soul has the right to say one word on his own account... ...For this Divine Covenant is an institution of the Lord. The Blessed Perfection in all the Tablets, Books, Epistles and supplications, has begged confirmations
subcodes.subjects: @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @role of the Covenant in preserving unity, @firmness in the Covenant
